name: ArcAroma AB (publ)
summary: ArcAroma AB (publ) operates as a cleantech company worldwide. It develops CEPT, a patented platform for the biological purification and hygiene of pumpable products. The company was formerly known as Arc Aroma Pure AB (publ) and changed its name to ArcAroma AB (publ) in November 2019. ArcAroma AB (publ) was founded in 2008 and is based in Lund, Sweden.
